title: 2025-09-22 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 11.75
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2025-09-22: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 11.75/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-09-22, the score printed 11.75/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and volatility doing most of the work.
